examples: I think we deserved the victory over Derby and I was delighted to get on the scoresheet.
Check the number and name list of the players registered on the scoresheet when you get it.
Suarez has made eight appearances for Spain's U-17 side, landing himself on the scoresheet twice.
He also praised Bendtner, along with Moroccan forward Maroune Chamakh, for both getting on the scoresheet.
